title: Factory CES Production-Function Recovery — extrapolating symbolic regression
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training output (ignores K,L) -> ~0.1
Cobb-Douglas log-linear OLS log y ~ 1 + log K + log L: captures the power-law trend but assumes unit substitution elasticity (rho=0), biased and extrapolates only moderately

translog / Kmenta second-order fit [1, logK, logL, logK^2, logL^2, logK*logL] by least squares: recovers the CES substitution curvature, extrapolates markedly better into the higher-throughput held-out region
alternatives: nonlinear grid search over rho with per-rho least squares on the exact CES form, ridge-regularised bases, or trading complexity penalty against held-out error
